default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and pivot strategy to competitor comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** GrowthX content shows strong engagement (\~50% rate), but the Looker dashboard needs to track conversions (e.g., form submits) per page to prove ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Strategy Pivot:** Shift from broad topics to bottom-funnel competitor comparisons (e.g., Deepgram vs. AssemblyAI) to directly address sales team needs and capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:** Deepgram has a 28% presence across 7 LLMs (tracked via Scrunch), but this must be actively managed to counter a recent drop in ChatGPT referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [**Language Pages:** The technical plan is feasible; Erik will get content guidance from Hassan and Patricia via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Reporting Gaps

  - [GrowthX content traffic is recovering after a post-Thanksgiving dip, with strong engagement (\~50% rate).](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Key Gap:** The Looker dashboard lacks per-page conversion data.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [**Why it matters:** This data is essential to prove content ROI and justify the investment.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik will add a view to filter conversions by GrowthX-produced pages.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Drop:** A recent drop in ChatGPT traffic is a wider market trend (correlated with college breaks), not a Deepgram-specific issue.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Deepgram's Cause:** A single free transcription page, which generates low-quality leads, lost its high ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Significance:** This drop requires a proactive strategy to maintain executive confidence in LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

### Strategy Pivot: Competitor Comparisons

  - [The team will pivot from broad topics to bottom-funnel competitor content.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Directly addresses sales team needs for competitive answers and captures high-intent, decision-making traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [**New Content Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
      - [Detailed comparison charts and infographics.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
      - [Vendor-specific breakouts (e.g., Deepgram vs. Google Text-to-Speech).](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Future Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
      - [Voice agent building and conversation analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [**Technical Plan:** Deepgram's upcoming CMS migration will support this pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [**Goal:** Use SEO-friendly URLs (e.g., `/compare/assemblyai`) to improve discoverability and authority.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [**Support:** A new website planner will ensure proper implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

### LLM Visibility Tracking (Scrunch)

  - [GrowthX uses the Scrunch platform to track Deepgram's presence across 7 LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [**Current Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [**Overall Presence:** 28% (outperforms competitors).](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [**Citations:** 92% from third-party sources (e.g., Wikipedia, Reddit), indicating high authority.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [**How it works:**](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Tracks \~75 "seed prompts" (e.g., "AI tools for sentiment analysis").](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [Monitors competitor citations to identify content gaps (e.g., AssemblyAI's URL for "best API models for real-time speech recognition").](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik will share the list of 75 seed prompts with Troy.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)

### Speech-to-Text Language Pages

  - [**Goal:** Create dedicated pages for each supported language.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [**Technical Feasibility:** GrowthX's engineering team confirmed the project is a low-lift, feasible via manual template copying.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [**Content Questions for Deepgram:**](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
      - [Should page copy be consistent across all languages?](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [Are the four features in the template the only ones to include?](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
      - [Who is the best contact for FAQ content?](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik will post these questions in Slack, tagging Hassan and Patricia.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

      - [Post content questions for the language pages in Slack (tagging Hassan & Patricia).](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
      - [Create Airtable assignments for competitor comparison content.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [**Troy:**](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
      - [Review and approve the 5 recently submitted blog posts for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/sQ9bPNqB5JfxdqfWc_kK5FrtvSakzeKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
